Lyrics.text:
Mamela heloka, (in- telo )
Ry Jeso Tompo tia
Miantrà, (in- telo )
Jeso tia mamalia.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Fantatrao, fantatrao,
(O! fantatrao, ô! fantatrao, )
Fantatrao Tompo ô,
’Zay tena mahasoa ny fanahiko re
(’Zay mahasoa, ’zay mahasoa dia fantatrao)
Mamelà, mamelà heloka, Jeso tia.
Mamelà, mamelà heloka, Jeso tia.

:,: He, manantona Anao (Ouam) :,:
Fa hankaiza tokoa (Ouam)
Moa, ry Jesosy tia, (Ouam)
’Ty mpanota izay (Ouam, ouam, ouam)
Tsy mahavonjy tena ity? (Tena ity).

Miady mafy tokoa
Ka mitolona re.
Tsy ny sitrako ange
’Zao tanteraka izao
Ka vonjeo, Tompo ô.
Mamelà, Jeso tia,
Mamalia.

O! afeno aminao (Ouam)
Ity nofoko ity; (Ouam)
Tehirizo ho Anao, (Ouam)
Ry mpamonjiko ô, (Ouam)
Mamelà heloka, (Ouam, ouam, ouam)
Mitalaho Aminao, Jeso tia.
